description: A detailed engraving depicting captured Swedish ships being brought into St. Petersburg harbor. The scene shows multiple sailing vessels on the Neva River, flanked by the grand buildings and palaces of the new Russian capital. Buildings line both banks with elaborate Baroque architecture. Text in Cyrillic script appears on a banner at the top. Smoke from cannon salutes rises from the ships. The composition provides a panoramic view of the city during the Great Northern War era. No biblical or religious content is present.

_meta.title: The Bringing of Swedish Ships to St. Petersburg
